---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help improve Summ-AI-rize
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- Ollama version: [run `ollama --version`]
- LLM model: [e.g. llama3.2]

## Logs
Paste any relevant logs from the terminal where Streamlit is running.

## Additional context
Screenshots, transcript samples, anything else relevant.
